reference: THE BANQUET WAS TO BEGIN IN A FEW HOURS YET HE COULD NOT LET THE DAY PASS WITHOUT SEEING DAPHNE AND TELLING HER THE WORDS OF THE ORACLE
text: the banquet was to begin in a few hours yet he could not let the day pass without seeing daphne and telling her the words of the oracle the oracle was to begin in a few hours yet he could not let the day pass without seeing daphne
